criteria_results.description: Mobile view does not contain any '+' buttons or 'Add Object' menus.
criteria_results.evidence: In client/src/pages/home.tsx (lines 30-38), the mobile layout only renders Canvas and MobileBottomBar, explicitly omitting ObjectToolbar and Sidebars. MobileBottomBar.tsx has been refactored to remove all '+' buttons and object creation logic.

criteria_results.description: For PM role on mobile, MobileBottomBar renders a button to add photos to a selected object.
criteria_results.evidence: MobileBottomBar.tsx (lines 110-124) renders a 'Photo' button (Camera icon) and a gallery access button (ImageIcon) for users not in the TECH role when an object is selected.

criteria_results.description: For TECH role on mobile, MobileBottomBar renders only a checkbox/switch for 'Color by status'.
criteria_results.evidence: MobileBottomBar.tsx (lines 75-81) implements a specific branch for the TECH role that returns a 48px bar containing only the StatusToggle (Checkbox + 'By status' label).

criteria_results.description: Mobile Bottom Bar does not expand/slide upwards.
criteria_results.evidence: The refactored MobileBottomBar.tsx uses a fixed height of 'h-12' and has removed all Sheet/Drawer components and sliding animation logic.

criteria_results.description: Technicians cannot drag or resize objects on mobile.
criteria_results.evidence: ObjectRenderer.tsx (lines 145-146) sets disableDragging and enableResizing based on isTech. Canvas.tsx (lines 39, 76, 95, 129) further enforces this by disabling keyboard deletions, drag-and-drop, and forcing the 'select' tool for Technicians.

suggestions: The component client/src/components/editor/MobileAddObjectPanel.tsx is no longer imported or used; consider deleting it to keep the codebase clean.

ObjectPhotoGallery.tsx (line 155) still contains a Plus icon for adding photos inside the gallery dialog; while acceptable for PMs, it could be replaced with a Camera icon to be 100% consistent with the 'no pluses' directive.
